name: Rum Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, combine walnuts, vanilla wafers, and 1 cup of powdered sugar; pulse several times to mix well.
2. Add rum gradually, a little at a time, until the mixture is moistened and forms a soft, pliable dough.
3. Turn the dough out onto a work surface lightly dusted with confectioners' sugar.
4. Dust your hands lightly with confectioners' sugar.
5. Pull off walnut-sized pieces of dough and roll them between your palms to form compact balls.
6. Roll each ball again in confectioners' sugar to coat.
This recipe yields about 2 1/2 dozen.
